pages.name: Home
pages.description: Landing page introducing the work-from-home opportunity and guiding users to key actions.
primary_functions: Introduce the work-from-home business opportunity, core benefits, and key programs.
Provide primary calls-to-action to view plans & pricing, apply now, and register for the free webinar.
Show a teaser version of the earnings calculator with a link to the full calculator page.
Highlight featured programs, upcoming webinar, and selected success stories to build trust.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click header navigation link "Plans & Pricing" or a primary CTA in the hero section.
Click header navigation link "Programs" or a featured program section link.
Click header navigation link "Free Webinar" or the featured webinar card/button.
Click the "Open full calculator" button in the Earnings Calculator teaser section.
Click the primary hero CTA button labeled "Apply Now" or "Get Started".
Click a link in the featured success stories section such as "View more stories".
Click a specific featured program card on the homepage.
Click a specific featured success story card on the homepage.
Click the featured webinar card title or "Learn more" link.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the main logo and the "Home" header navigation link.
Primary landing URL users arrive on from ads, search, or shared links.

pages.name: Plans & Pricing
pages.description: Listing of all starter plans with filters and sorting to help users choose a plan.
primary_functions: Display available work-from-home starter plans in card or list format.
Provide filters including maximum price, 1-on-1 coaching, and training modules count (e.g., 5+ modules).
Allow sorting of plans by criteria such as Price  Low to High.
Link each plan card to its plan detail page for deeper information and sign-up.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a plan card from the filtered and sorted list.
Click a contextual CTA such as "Not sure which plan? Apply now" if present.

access_methods.description: Selected from the "Plans & Pricing" header navigation item.
Selected from the "Plans & Pricing" footer navigation link.
Linked from CTAs on the homepage hero and other promotional sections.

pages.name: Plan Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a specific starter plan with a focused sign-up flow.
primary_functions: Show full details of the selected plan, including price, modules, coaching options, and inclusions.
Present user reviews or FAQs specific to the plan to support decision making.
Provide a primary call-to-action button labeled 'Get Started with This Plan'.
Display an embedded sign-up form (or popup) where the selected plan is preselected and the user can enter name and email and click Continue.

incoming_params.description: The Plan.id of the selected plan whose details should be displayed.

access_methods.description: Accessed as plan_detail.html?id={Plan.id} when a user selects a plan from listings or featured content.

pages.name: Webinars
pages.description: Browse and filter upcoming webinars, including introductory overviews.
primary_functions: List upcoming webinars with summary cards including title, date, time, and topic.
Provide filters for date range (e.g., Next 14 days), time of day (e.g., Evening 6pm9pm), and topic/type (e.g., Introductory Overview).
Allow sorting of webinars by date (e.g., Earliest date first).
Link each webinar card to a webinar detail page for more information and registration.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a webinar card in the listing.

access_methods.description: Selected from the "Free Webinar" header navigation link.
Selected from the "Webinars" footer navigation link.
Linked from webinar CTAs on the homepage and other pages.

pages.name: Webinar Detail
pages.description: Detailed information and registration form for a specific webinar.
primary_functions: Display detailed webinar information including agenda, host, date, time, and time zone notes.
Provide a clear registration button labeled 'Reserve my spot' or 'Register now'.
Show an embedded registration form where users can enter name, email, choose time zone, and set reminder preferences.
Confirm registration on-page after submission with a concise success message.

incoming_params.description: The Webinar.id for the webinar whose details and registration form should be displayed.

access_methods.description: Accessed as webinar_detail.html?id={Webinar.id} when a user selects a webinar from the listing or featured section.

pages.name: Earnings Calculator
pages.description: Full-screen earnings calculator to estimate and save a personalized income plan.
primary_functions: Allow users to input hours per week, average sale value, monthly leads, and conversion rate.
Calculate estimated monthly income based on the provided inputs.
Display the calculated income result clearly with any relevant assumptions.
Provide a 'Save this earnings plan' or 'Save my estimate' action that opens a simple form to capture name and email and save the plan.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a contextual CTA such as "Apply now with this earnings plan" after viewing an estimate (if provided in UI).

access_methods.description: Selected from the "Earnings Calculator" header navigation link.
Selected from the "Earnings Calculator" footer navigation link.
Accessed from the "Open full calculator" link on the homepage teaser.

pages.name: Programs
pages.description: Listing of different business tracks/programs with filters for time and earnings.
primary_functions: Display all available work-from-home programs/business tracks with key stats (time commitment, average monthly earnings, live sessions per month).
Provide a 'Time commitment' filter including an option such as 'Up to 10 hours/week'.
Include filters for 'Includes live group sessions' and 'Live sessions per month' (e.g., 3 or more).
Allow sorting by 'Average monthly earnings  High to Low' to find the most lucrative programs.
Link each program card to its program detail page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a program card in the filtered and sorted list.

access_methods.description: Selected from the "Programs" header navigation link.
Selected from the "Programs" footer navigation link.
Linked from featured program sections on the homepage.

pages.name: Program Detail
pages.description: Detailed overview of a specific program with an option to save it to favorites.
primary_functions: Provide an in-depth description of the selected program, including curriculum, support, and expected outcomes.
Show metrics such as typical time commitment, average monthly earnings, and number of live group sessions.
Offer a primary action such as 'Add to Favorites' or 'Save this program'.
Display an inline or popup form to collect name, email, and password to create a simple account for saving the program, without requiring a separate login page.

incoming_params.description: The Program.id of the program to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a CTA such as "Apply now for this program" after favoriting or reviewing details.

access_methods.description: Accessed as program_detail.html?id={Program.id} from the Programs listing or featured program areas.

pages.name: Success Stories
pages.description: Filterable library of success stories and testimonials.
primary_functions: List success stories with summary cards showing name (or alias), lifestyle, earnings range, and hours worked.
Provide a 'Lifestyle' filter including an option for 'Parents'.
Include a 'Monthly earnings' filter or slider with adjustable minimum (e.g., $2500+).
Offer an 'Hours worked per week' filter with options such as '2030 hours'.
Allow sorting by 'Most recent' so newest stories appear first.
Link each story card to its full story detail page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a success story card in the listing.

access_methods.description: Selected from the "Success Stories" header navigation link.
Selected from the "Success Stories" footer navigation link.
Linked from featured success story teasers on the homepage and other pages.

pages.name: Story Detail
pages.description: Full narrative of a single success story with a save/bookmark option.
primary_functions: Present the complete success story narrative including background, challenges, and results.
Highlight key stats such as monthly earnings, hours per week, and chosen program or plan.
Provide a 'Save to reading list' or 'Bookmark this story' button.
Show a simple popup or inline form allowing users to continue as guest by entering their email to save/bookmark the story.

incoming_params.description: The SuccessStory.id of the story whose details should be shown.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a link such as the program name inside the success story, when present.
Click a link such as the starter plan name mentioned in the story, when present.

access_methods.description: Accessed as story_detail.html?id={SuccessStory.id} from the Success Stories listing or homepage featured stories.

pages.name: Application
pages.description: Application form for prospects to apply for the work-from-home program.
primary_functions: Collect key preference data such as availability (e.g., Part-time 1020 hours/week), monthly budget, preferred start date, and areas of interest (e.g., Email Marketing, Affiliate Sales).
Collect contact information including full name, email, phone, and a free-text goals/intent field.
Provide a required agreement checkbox for Terms & Conditions.
Submit the completed application and display a confirmation or next steps message.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Apply Now" header navigation link.
Accessed via the "Application" footer navigation link.
Accessed from primary CTAs on the homepage and contextual "Apply" buttons on other pages.
Form submission stays on the same page and shows a confirmation state after calling submitApplication.

pages.name: Newsletter Preferences
pages.description: Settings page to subscribe to and configure the marketing newsletter.
primary_functions: Allow users to choose newsletter frequency such as 'Weekly summary'.
Provide a topics list where users can clear all and then select specific topics like 'Email Marketing' and 'Social Media Strategy'.
Offer settings for best time to receive emails and content types (e.g., Tips & Tutorials vs. Product Announcements).
Collect email and first name and submit the subscription with the chosen preferences.

access_methods.description: Selected from the "Newsletter" footer navigation link on any page.
Linked from in-page newsletter signup prompts across the site.
Submitting the preferences calls saveNewsletterSubscription and keeps the user on this page with a success state.

pages.name: Help Center / FAQ
pages.description: Central support hub with searchable FAQs, including information on the money-back guarantee.
primary_functions: Provide a searchable FAQ interface with a prominent search bar (e.g., to search for 'refund').
Display search results with question titles and expandable answers, including one about the 30-day money-back guarantee.
Show the full answer to selected questions directly on the page.
Include a link or button under each answer labeled 'Still need help? Contact support' that leads to the contact support page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the "Still need help? Contact support" link under the FAQ answer about the 30-day money-back guarantee.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Help Center" header navigation link.
Accessed via the "Help Center / FAQ" footer navigation link.
May be linked directly from contextual help links on other pages.

pages.name: Contact Support
pages.description: Contact form page for support inquiries, including billing and refund questions.
primary_functions: Provide a topic dropdown that includes 'Billing & Refunds'.
Allow users to enter a subject line and detailed message describing their question or issue.
Collect user contact details including name and email.
Submit the message to support and show a confirmation state that the inquiry was sent.

incoming_params.description: Optional topic preset (e.g., 'billing_refunds') used to preselect the Topic dropdown.
Optional subject line preset passed from specific FAQ links.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Contact Support" link in the site footer.
Accessed as contact.html?topic=billing_refunds&subject=... when coming from a specific FAQ entry in the Help Center.
Submitting the contact form calls submitContactMessage and shows an inline confirmation.

pages.name: About
pages.description: Background information about the business and how the opportunity works.
primary_functions: Explain the mission, values, and approach behind the work-from-home business opportunity.
Describe the type of support, coaching, and training modules provided.
Build trust through information about experience, track record, and customer focus.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a CTA such as "Apply Now" within the About content.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "About" footer navigation link.
May be linked from trust-building sections on other pages.

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Legal page describing how user data and privacy are handled.
primary_functions: Detail what personal data is collected through forms (e.g., applications, webinar registrations, newsletter).
Explain how data is used, stored, and protected, and outline user rights and contact channels for privacy requests.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Privacy Policy" footer navigation link.
May be linked from consent text near forms across the site.

pages.name: Terms & Conditions
pages.description: Legal terms governing use of the website and participation in programs.
primary_functions: Outline general terms of use for the website and programs.
Describe guarantees and refund policies including the 30-day money-back guarantee.
Clarify limitations of liability and user responsibilities.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Terms & Conditions" footer navigation link.
Linked from agreement checkboxes and guarantee references on other pages.

header_links.description: Browse starter plans and pricing options
Explore available business tracks and programs
View and register for upcoming webinars
Estimate and save a monthly earnings plan
Submit an application to get started

footer_links.description: Learn more about our company and approach
Review all plans and pricing details
View all programs and business tracks
See the webinar schedule and register
Apply to join the work-from-home program
Send a message to customer support
Read our privacy practices and data policy
